issue_summary: Provide wrapper conversion, ReactiveWrappers and RxJava 2 type conversion.
javadoc_before:
/** * Converters to potentially wrap the execution of a repository method into a variety of wrapper types potentially being * available on the classpath. Currently supported: *
    *
  • {@code java.util.Optional}
    • *
  • {@code com.google.common.base.Optional}
    • *
  • {@code scala.Option}
    • *
  • {@code java.util.concurrent.Future}
    • *
  • {@code java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture}
    • *
  • {@code org.springframework.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<}
    • *
  • {@code rx.Single}
    • *
  • {@code rx.Observable}
    • *
  • {@code rx.Completable}
    • *
  • {@code reactor.core.publisher.Mono}
    • *
  • {@code reactor.core.publisher.Flux}
    • *
  • {@code org.reactivestreams.Publisher}
    • *
* * @author Oliver Gierke * @author Mark Paluch * @since 1.8 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Converters to potentially wrap the execution of a repository method into a variety of wrapper types potentially being * available on the classpath. Currently supported: *
    *
  • {@code java.util.Optional}
    • *
  • {@code com.google.common.base.Optional}
    • *
  • {@code scala.Option}
    • *
  • {@code java.util.concurrent.Future}
    • *
  • {@code java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture}
    • *
  • {@code org.springframework.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<}
    • *
  • Reactive wrappers supported by {@link ReactiveWrappers}
    • *
* * @author Oliver Gierke * @author Mark Paluch * @since 1.8 * @see ReactiveWrappers */
